name: PRODUCT_TYPE-STORE
description: Configuration for a specific product type and Shopify store combination

product.name: Product Type Name
product.description: What is this product? (used in Gemini prompts)

prompts.metadata: Analyze this {product_name} design image and provide structured metadata: title (max 60 characters), teaser, full description highlighting unique elements, exactly 13 tags, category, mood, design highlights (3 items), finish (matte/glossy), colors, and Shopify-formatted HTML description. Return only valid JSON.
prompts.lifestyle_table: A realistic professional product photograph of {product_name} using the provided pregenerated mockup attached to place the product on a wooden table, face down, with a cozy cottagecore vibe, lit by sunlight. vertical 4:3 aspect ratio
prompts.lifestyle_hand: Realistic {product_name} product mockup using attached product design image held by a woman's hand with acrylic nails in a sunlit scene in pov perspective
